info.name: Driving School Management System API
info.description: Combined API collection for the Driving School Management System. All requests go through the API Gateway (port 8080).

request.description: Retrieves all documents associated with a specific student, including their status and upload dates.

query.description: (Required) Type of document (ID_CARD, DRIVING_LICENSE, MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE, etc.) (This can only be one of ID_COPY,MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE,PHOTO,DRIVING_LICENSE_COPY)

request.description: Uploads a document for a student. Supported document types include ID_CARD, DRIVING_LICENSE, MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE, etc.

query.description: (Required) Type of document (ID_CARD, DRIVING_LICENSE, MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE, etc.) (This can only be one of ID_COPY,MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE,PHOTO,DRIVING_LICENSE_COPY)

response.name: Invalid document type or file path

query.description: (Required) Type of document (ID_CARD, DRIVING_LICENSE, MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE, etc.) (This can only be one of ID_COPY,MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE,PHOTO,DRIVING_LICENSE_COPY)
(Required) Type of document (ID_CARD, DRIVING_LICENSE, MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE, etc.) (This can only be one of ID_COPY,MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE,PHOTO,DRIVING_LICENSE_COPY)

request.description: Retrieves detailed information about a student by their unique identifier
Updates existing student details. All fields are validated.
Permanently deletes a student from the system. This action cannot be undone.

response.name: Cannot delete student with active lessons or payments

query.description: (Required) Name to search (first or last name)

request.description: Searches for students by first name or last name. The search is case-insensitive and partial matches are supported.

query.description: (Required) Name to search (first or last name)
Filter by student status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED) (This can only be one of PENDING,ACTIVE,SUSPENDED,GRADUATED)

request.description: Retrieves a list of all students. Can be optionally filtered by status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED).

query.description: Filter by student status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED) (This can only be one of PENDING,ACTIVE,SUSPENDED,GRADUATED)

request.description: Creates a new student with the provided information. Validates CNP, email, and phone number.

response.name: Invalid input data or validation failed
Student with this CNP or email already exists

request.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific lesson, including student, instructor, and vehicle details.
Updates lesson details, typically used for rescheduling. Validates new time slot availability.
Cancels a scheduled lesson. The lesson status will be updated to CANCELLED.

response.name: Cannot cancel lesson that has already started or completed

request.description: Retrieves all lessons scheduled for a specific instructor, including past and future lessons.
Finds all instructors who are available for a specific time slot. Checks for existing lesson conflicts.

response.name: Available instructors retrieved successfully

request.description: Creates a new lesson booking. Validates instructor and vehicle availability, and checks for conflicts.

response.name: Invalid input data or validation failed
Instructor or vehicle not available for the requested time slot

request.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific vehicle, including status and insurance information.
Updates existing vehicle details. Can be used to update insurance expiry, status, or other vehicle information.
Finds all vehicles that are available for a specific time slot. Checks for existing lesson conflicts and vehicle status.

query.description: Filter by vehicle status (AVAILABLE, IN_USE, MAINTENANCE, RETIRED) (This can only be one of AVAILABLE,IN_USE,MAINTENANCE,OUT_OF_SERVICE)

request.description: Retrieves a list of all vehicles in the fleet. Can be optionally filtered by status (AVAILABLE, IN_USE, MAINTENANCE, RETIRED).

query.description: Filter by vehicle status (AVAILABLE, IN_USE, MAINTENANCE, RETIRED) (This can only be one of AVAILABLE,IN_USE,MAINTENANCE,OUT_OF_SERVICE)

request.description: Creates a new vehicle in the fleet. Validates license plate uniqueness and insurance expiry date.

response.name: Invalid input data or validation failed
Vehicle with this license plate already exists

request.description: Updates the status of a payment. Uses pessimistic locking to prevent concurrent status updates. Refunded payments cannot have their status changed.

response.name: Invalid status change (e.g., trying to change refunded payment)

request.description: Processes a refund for a completed payment. Uses pessimistic locking to prevent concurrent refunds. Only completed payments can be refunded.

response.name: Payment cannot be refunded (invalid status or already refunded)

request.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific payment, including status, amount, method, and associated invoice.
Calculates the total balance (sum of all payments) for a student. Returns the total amount paid.
Retrieves all payment transactions for a specific student, ordered by transaction date (newest first).
Processes a new payment for a student. Validates payment amount and method. Generates an invoice automatically.

response.name: Invalid input data or validation failed
